title: IBM Ventures invests in SQK and QodeX Quantum to accelerate Quantum innovation
why:
- IBM Ventures has invested in SQK and QodeX Quantum, two startups focused on quantum software innovation.
- SQK is developing hybrid quantum-classical algorithms for medical image reconstruction, aiming to improve diagnostics in oncology, cardiovascular health, and neuroscience.
- QodeX Quantum is creating a platform to enable quantum-native AI models, integrating quantum computing into machine learning workflows for advanced enterprise analytics.
- These startups are participating in advanced phases of the Alchemist Chicago accelerator program, supported by IBM's technology, mentorship, and networks.
- IBM's efforts, including partnerships and investments, are aimed at building a comprehensive ecosystem to bridge the gap between quantum science and real-world applications.
- Illinois is highlighted as a growing hub for quantum innovation with the deployment of IBM Quantum System Two and the creation of the National Quantum Algorithm Center.
